element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn lemmings walk in one direction, fall off edges, turn around at obstacles
Vertical traversal; lemmings climb but fall if hitting overhang
Safe descent from heights using parachute
Static placement to redirect lemming flow without harming lemmings
Creates 12-step stairway; stops at obstacles or ceiling
Horizontal tunnel excavation; cannot penetrate steel
5-second timer before self-detonation; destroys landscape but not lemmings or traps
Fall damage obstacle requiring floaters or alternative routes
Environmental hazards requiring avoidance or skillful traversal
Level timer forces efficiency; expiration causes all lemmings to explode

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully routing a group of lemmings to the exit
Skill assignment solving an immediate obstacle
Pausing to inspect level and plan
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time puzzle with player-controlled pacing via lemming release rate adjustment and pause capability; tension builds through environmental hazards and time pressure; relief comes from successful obstacle navigation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to lemming mechanics and basic skills (Climber, Floater, Blocker); simple obstacle avoidance in safe contexts
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of excavation skills (Basher, Miner, Digger); complex environment navigation; dangerous hazards (lava, traps, fire) requiring skill combination
difficulty_curve.late_game: Bomber skill introduction; intricate multi-skill puzzle solutions; high save percentage requirements; tight time limits and constrained skill allocation
notable_spikes: Transition to hazard-based levels requiring floater/avoidance
Introduction of bomber skill requiring precise timing
High-percentage save requirements in later difficulty categories

notable_level_patterns.description: Lemmings enter from top, must traverse horizontally through environment obstacles to reach exit; skill usage determines viable path
Large vertical drops requiring floaters or alternative elevated routes to avoid fall damage
Solid terrain barriers requiring bashers, miners, or diggers to tunnel new paths
Limited quantities of specific skills force players to choose which lemmings receive assignments; requires decision-making under pressure
Lava, traps, and fire create dangerous zones requiring skill-based avoidance or ledge navigation
